dataset_name: Zhu et al. 2025 — genome-scale CRISPRi Perturb-seq (repo anchor)
reachability_question: Is the Th2->Th1 polarization shift reachable by a non-negative CRISPRi-knockdown mix, and if outside, which genes does the Farkas certificate demand be ACTIVATED?

dataset_name: Replogle et al. 2020 — direct-guide-capture combinatorial CRISPR screens
reachability_question: Do single-gene effect vectors additively predict the measured double-perturbation state, i.e. does the co-perturbation lie in the cone spanned by its singletons (additivity test)?

dataset_name: Adamson et al. 2016 — UPR Perturb-seq / epistasis
reachability_question: Is the UPR-activated state reachable from the unstressed baseline by a non-negative combination of single-gene knockdown effect vectors?
Is the LPS-stimulated dendritic-cell state reachable by a non-negative combination of TF-knockout effect vectors, or does the certificate flag an activation-only residual?
Is the IFN-gamma-induced PD-L1-high state reversible by a non-negative knockout combination (joint RNA+protein target direction)?

dataset_name: Srivatsan et al. 2020 — sci-Plex chemical transcriptomics
reachability_question: Which non-negative drug combination reaches a target cytostatic/differentiation state, and is a desired state outside the single-drug cone?

dataset_name: LINCS L1000 Connectivity Map — phase I
reachability_question: Is the reverse of a disease signature reachable by a non-negative combination of drug signatures (signature-reversal drug-combination design)?

dataset_name: LINCS L1000 Connectivity Map — phase II
reachability_question: Extending phase I: which combinable drug signatures span the reverse of a target disease signature, and which residual genes need a genetic (non-drug) modality?

dataset_name: Joung et al. 2023 — Transcription Factor Atlas of directed differentiation
reachability_question: Which non-negative combination of TF-overexpression effect vectors reaches a target differentiated cell state (directed-differentiation recipe on an activation basis)?

dataset_name: Cui et al. 2024 — Immune Dictionary (in vivo cytokine perturbation)
reachability_question: Which non-negative cytokine combination reaches a target immune-cell activation state, and is that state outside the single-cytokine cone?
Is the TCR-stimulated Jurkat activation state reachable by a non-negative combination of TCR-pathway knockout effect vectors?

dataset_name: Tian et al. 2019 — CRISPRi screen in iPSC-derived neurons
reachability_question: Is a neurodegeneration-associated transcriptional state reversible toward baseline by a non-negative knockdown combination in neurons?
Is the Treg<->Teff state shift reachable by a non-negative knockout combination using a joint RNA+protein target direction?

dataset_name: Replogle et al. 2022 — genome-scale essential-gene Perturb-seq (K562)
reachability_question: Does the reachability cone geometry transfer across cell types? K562 provides a 2nd human basis for the within- vs cross-cell-type transfer test (843 perturbations shared with RPE1).

dataset_name: Replogle et al. 2022 — genome-scale essential-gene Perturb-seq (RPE1)
reachability_question: Third human cell type (non-cancer epithelium): tests whether verdict/recipe are cell-type-invariant vs cell-type-specific.
